While it's being produced naturally, your levels will decrease with age. That's why using a CoQ10 supplement is very beneficial.

name: Creatine HMB LCLT
description_html:
Creatine HMB + LCLT is a high-performance formula designed for athletes who want more than just basic creatine. This advanced blend combines three well-researched ingredients to support strength, training intensity, and overall performance output.

Each serving delivers 5000mg of micronized creatine monohydrate, the gold standard for increasing strength, power, and muscle performance. Creatine helps support ATP production, allowing you to train harder, lift heavier, and push through high-intensity efforts with greater output.

To complement creatine, this formula includes 3000mg of HMB (beta-hydroxy beta-methylbutyrate), a metabolite of leucine that plays a role in supporting muscle recovery and reducing muscle protein breakdown. Research has shown that the combination of creatine and HMB may enhance strength, anaerobic performance, and lean body mass more than either ingredient alone. This makes it especially valuable during intense training phases or calorie-restricted periods.

Additionally, 2000 mg of L-carnitine L-tartrate (LCLT) is included to support exercise performance and recovery. LCLT is commonly used by athletes to help maintain training intensity and support post-workout recovery.

name: Huge Ecdysterone | Muscle Builder
description_html:
Ecdysterone, also known as 20-Hydroxyecdysone, is a unique naturally occurring hormone found in insects and plants. Research on Ecdysterone has shown that it functions as an anabolic agent, meaning it has the ability to enhance both lean muscle growth and strength.

What separates Huge Ecdysterone from the other options on the market is that we've created a unique and highly bioavailable combination - our Ecdysterone is complexed with Hydroxypropyl-β-Cyclodextrin.

This development is game-changing because Ecdysterone is hydrophobic, meaning it has low solubility in water, which can limit its absorption in the gastrointestinal tract. Hydroxypropyl-β-Cyclodextrin can form inclusion complexes with Ecdysterone, encapsulating it within its hydrophobic cavity.

This encapsulation increases the solubility of Ecdysterone in water, facilitating its dispersion and absorption in the aqueous environment of the gastrointestinal tract. Being able to absorb the active ingredient optimally is crucial when reaping this compound's benefits.

Since launching Huge Ecdysterone, it has accumulated thousands of positive reviews. Many users back up its performance-enhancing abilities, noticing improvements in lean muscle gains, strength, and recovery after several weeks of using the product.

name: Liquid Carnitine 3000
description_html:
What Does Liquid L-Carnitine Do

Liquid L-Carnitine has become increasingly popular due to the fact that it works through a unique metabolic pathway. Its primary role is to help the body convert stored fat into usable energy, which makes it a powerful tool for fat loss. Here's how it works step by step, to help you fully understand what liquid carnitine does:

  1. Mobilizing Fat Stores: Once consumed, liquid l-carnitine begins to work by freeing up stored fatty acids from fat tissue. Once done, they can be made available for use as energy.
  2. Transporting Fat Into the Mitochondria: Once prepared, carnitine shuttles fatty acids into the mitochondria. The mitochondria are considered the powerhouses of your cells, and they play a role in energy production.
  3. Converting Fat Into Energy: This is where the magic happens! Once the fatty acids arrive inside the mitochondria, they are oxidized (burned). This produces usable energy for training, performance, and daily activity.

By enhancing the transport and burning of fatty acids for fuel, Liquid L-Carnitine helps make fat metabolism more efficient and effective. It's undoubtedly one of the most reliable and versatile non-stimulant options for supporting fat loss.

Does Liquid L-Carnitine Work?

Extensive scientific research suggests that liquid carnitine does work. A large meta-analysis of 37 randomized controlled trials found that L-carnitine supplementation led to statistically significant reductions in body weight, BMI, and fat mass, with daily doses of roughly 2000mg showing the most optimal results. 

We've gone a step further than standard liquid carnitine formulas by including a full 3000mg of L-Carnitine L-Tartrate plus a clinically backed dose of MitoBurn®. This ingredient helps activate brown adipose tissue (BAT), increasing thermogenesis and calorie expenditure for an even greater metabolic effect.

That said, it's important to note that it's not a magical solution for fat loss. Research shows that the best results are paired with proper training and nutrition. When consumed daily, it can support fat metabolism, boost performance, and aid recovery- making it easier for your body to tap into fat as a reliable fuel source.

Key Benefits Of Huge Liquid L-Carnitine

  • Enhanced Fat Metabolism - helps your body transport fatty acids into the mitochondria, where they can be burned as fuel.
  • Increased Calorie Expenditure - with the addition of MitoBurn® and GBB, our formula increases thermogenesis and ramps up the amount of calories you burn throughout the day.
  • Improved Performance & Recovery - liquid carnitine can also improve exercise performance, reduce muscle soreness, and speed up recovery.
  • Versatility - Highly effective on its own, but can also be stacked with other fat burner supplements to support fat loss further.
  • 100% Stimulant-Free - this product has no stimulants, meaning you won't have to worry about caffeine jitters or crashes. Take it at any time of the day to reap the benefits.
  • Fast-Absorbing Liquid Formula - Designed for rapid absorption and maximum effectiveness compared to capsules or powders.

name: Liquid Glycerol | 100% Active Formula
description_html:
Why Choose Liquid Glycerol

Glycerol is widely known as a key ingredient in pre-workout supplements. Its popularity lies in its ability to enhance muscle pumps, hydration, and endurance. However, powdered glycerol comes with a significant challenge. The more you add to a pre-workout formula, the more it negatively affects the product's consistency. 

High doses of powdered glycerol can lead to a gritty texture and poor Mixability, making it challenging to deliver sufficient amounts without compromising quality. Additionally, powdered glycerol requires stabilizers to remain functional.

Most forms found in pre-workouts are only about 65% active glycerol. In contrast, our liquid option contains 100% active glycerol, offering maximum effectiveness.

Our liquid glycerol solves these issues. It offers a smooth, easily mixable option that provides the same benefits without the drawbacks. It allows you to consume optimal doses of glycerol, maximizing performance, pumps, and hydration. Whether you're chasing intense pumps or superior hydration, liquid glycerol ensures optimal results with unmatched convenience.

How Glycerol Increases Muscle Pumps

Many individuals choose to take liquid glycerol to enhance muscle pumps, and it stands out for its unique mechanism of action. Unlike most pump products that focus on boosting nitric oxide to increase vasodilation, glycerol does things a little differently.

Glycerol's mechanism of action is unique and highly effective. It works by flooding your muscle cells with water through a process called hyperhydration. This influx of water increases muscle cell volume, leading to enhanced muscle fullness, skin-tearing pumps, and increased vascularity during your workout.

Its complementary pathway makes it an excellent option to stack with a nitric oxide-based pump product such as Magnify to flood all pathways for insane muscle pumps.

Key Benefits of Glycerol

  • Enhanced Cellular Hydration - Liquid glycerol helps pull water into muscle cells, promoting hyperhydration for improved performance, endurance, and recovery.
  • Skin-tearing Pumps - the increased intracellular water retention provides intense muscle pumps, vascularity, and fullness.
  • Improved Endurance - maintaining optimal fluid balance can significantly improve endurance by delaying dehydration and reducing fatigue during intense workouts.
  • Easier Digestion - liquid is easier to digest and doesn't cause the stomach discomfort that high doses of powdered forms can sometimes cause.
  • Versatility - ideal for stacking with other pre-workouts to amplify pumps and hydration or great as a standalone supplement.
  • Better Mixability - our liquid option mixes easily with water or pre-workouts, so you won't have to worry about gritty texture and poor solubility.
  • 100% Active Glycerol - unlike powdered forms, which typically contain only 65% active glycerol due to stabilizers, our liquid delivers 100% active glycerol for maximum effectiveness.
